title: Charred Smoky Portuguese Tortillas Quesadilla
description: A romantic portuguese dish that combines the flavors of charred vegetables with the comfort of a tortilla. The resulting quesadilla is smoky, slightly caramelized, and sure to impress.
instructions: Preheat your molcajete or a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Brush the tortillas with olive oil on both sides.
Season the chicken livers with smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken livers to the preheated molcajete and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side, until cooked through.
Remove the chicken livers from the molcajete and set aside.
Add the sliced red onion and red bell pepper to the molcajete and cook for 5-7 minutes, until caramelized.
Add the zucchini to the molcajete and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Place a tortilla in the molcajete and sprinkle with chicken liver, caramelized onion and bell pepper mixture, and zucchini.
Fold the tortilla in half and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the tortilla is crispy and the filling is heated through.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the other side is crispy and the filling is heated through.
Repeat with the remaining tortillas and filling.
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve immediately.
